title: T-Racers Mix 'N Race Thunder Truck – Launcher Truck with 3 actions in 1. Includes 1 Exclusive T-Racer Mix 'N Race Vehicle, Vehicle Riding Area, Launching Handle and Space for 7 Cars
features: DISCOVER THE POWER OF THE THUNDER TRUCK – With T-Racers Mix 'N Race Thunder Truck, 3 actions in 1 vehicle 1 Place your T-Racer Mix 'N Race in the Mix 'N Race area to combine the parts and load it on the launcher. 2 Press to launch at full speed 3 Park your other Mix 'N Race T-Racers inside, ready to go racing whenever you are

MIX 'N RACE ZONE – Discover the Mix 'N Race zone of this Thunder Truck where you can create endless combinations by swapping different parts of your T-Racers Mix 'N Race - you can load up to two cars; Not compatible with the T-Racers Turbo Tuning Teams vehicles
LAUNCH YOUR T-RACER AT TOP SPEED – Use the power of thunder to conquer the race; When your car is ready to race, press the shooter and launch it at top speed - will you win the race
TRANSPORT YOUR T-RACERS – With this Thunder Truck you can park up to 7 vehicles inside, ready to go racing whenever you are; take it all with you so you won't miss a race

EXCLUSIVE VEHICLE – You can only find this Exclusive T-Racer, Turbo Flame, with the Thunder Truck; remember that its parts can be combined with other T-Racers Mix 'N Race cars you have; not compatible with T-Racers Turbo Tuning Teams
